creator: matthias@petermann-it.de
text:
Sweet Home 3D 4.2 is a service release, delivering a bunch of improvements and bug fixes. Details can be found in the version history [1].

The attached patch:

  * upgrades to Sweet Home 3D 4.2
  * introduces staging support

[1] http://www.sweethome3d.com/history.jsp

Fix: Please apply the attached patch

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: N/A
